title: Mcdonalds fries
description: changes the texture of the baked potato to mcdonalds fries!
body:
## Mcdonalds fries texture pack
- changes the texture of the baked potato to Mcdonalds french fries!![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4a41beae77ba980e500e7ef2cd1ba1ddb43b752.png)
